headline: Why AT&T Stock Is (Still) a Top Pick for J.P. Morgan
summary: The wireless carrier is well-positioned to snatch market share away from its rivals, according to the investment bank.

headline: Verizon Stock: Cheap Multiple, Complicated Story
summary: Verizon (VZ) looks like a mathematical anomaly. Trading at about 9.8x trailing earnings and a mere 8.7x FY'27 consensus, the stock is priced like a business in secular decline.

raw.headline: Verizon Stock: Cheap Multiple, Complicated Story

headline: Dividend Income Update Q2, Q3, Q4 2025
summary: The market may move up and down irrationally and seemingly on a whim, while our dividends remain much more stable, reliable and predictable. Read more here.

headline: Assessing AT&T (T) Valuation After Mixed Short Term Returns And Long Term Shareholder Gains
summary: Why AT&T (T) is Back on Investors’ Radar AT&T (T) has drawn fresh attention as investors reassess the stock after a month of mixed returns and a stronger performance over the past 3 months, raising questions about how to interpret its recent moves. With the share price last closing at $26.12 and returns ranging from a 0.04% decline over 1 day to a 2.35% gain over the past week, the stock has not moved in a straight line recently. Over the past month it shows a 7.80% decline, while the past 3...
